allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); msgs = d.get\('messages', []\); print\(f'Total messages: {len\(msgs\)}'\); [print\(f\\"  [{m['ID']}] {m['Subject']} → {m['To'][0]['Address']}\\"\) for m in msgs[:3]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('HTML', ''\)[:1500]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); html = d.get\('HTML', ''\); import re; links = re.findall\(r'href=\\"\([^\\"]*abandonedcart[^\\"]*\)\\"', html\); print\('Recovery links found:', len\(links\)\); [print\(' →', l\) for l in links]")
